title: Board recertification letter
description: Draft and submit the board recertification letter for dermatology credentials renewal.

title: Review website redesign mockups
description: Go through the new Liora Dermatology website mockups from the design team and provide feedback.

title: Plan Lev's spring activities
description: Research toddler-friendly spring classes and outdoor activities. Look into swim lessons, music class, and local park programs.

title: Schedule date night
description: Pick a restaurant and book a sitter for a date night with Barric.
